title: Meccion PZ2 Impact Driver Bits 50mm Length 10Pcs Professional Pozidriv Magnetic Screwdriver Bits Set - 1/4 Inch Hex Shank
features: Premium Screwdriver Bits - Made of engineered steel with forged and heat treated for greater impact resistance and a longer service life.
Durable - Industrial grade S2 alloy steel bits with hardened to provide improved durability and reduced breakage, black oxide finish for corrosion resistance.
Smoothly - Precision milled profile and optimized tip for optimum fit results and avoid skidding during screwing，Ideal for continuous high torque use.
Compatible - Standard 1/4 inch hex shank compatible with most drills, electric screwdrivers, ratchet wrench.
HOW WE’RE DIFFERENT - We aim to make the best products to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We have a professional products monitoring team focusing on all the details.
description: MECCION continues to design and optimize professional jobsite solutions - tools, accessories and service - to ensure absolute confidence for the toughest conditions. We aim to make the best value products to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We have a professional products monitoring team focusing on all the details. From our proven performance to our focus on innovation and technology. The result is products we can stand behind. Meccion Professional PZ2 Impact Screwdriver Bits Set 1. Made of engineered steel with forged and heat treated 2. Hardened to provide improved durability 3. Black oxide finish for corrosion resistance 4. Precision milled profile for optimum fit results 5. Avoid skidding in continuous high torque use 6. Compatible with most standard drills and electric screwdrivers Package Include: 10pcs x 50mm PZ2 Screwdriver Bits
